name: HR_GEN_AI_TOOLS_VL
query: SELECT B.TOOL_ID, B.TOOL_CODE, B.TYPE, B.SUB_TYPE, B.FAMILY, B.PRODUCT, B.TOOL_CREATED_DATE, B.OWNER_ID, B.OWNER_NAME, B.NAMESPACE, B.STATUS, B.VERSION, B.MODULE_ID, B.HIDDEN_FLAG, B.USER_INPUT_REQUIRED, B.SPECIFICATION, B.INTERNAL_NAME, B.INTERNAL_DESCRIPTION, B.SEEDED_FLAG, B.CREATED_BY, B.CREATION_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATED_BY, B.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, B.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, B.OBJECT_VERSION_NUMBER, T.NAME NAME, T.DESCRIPTION, T.USER_INPUT_MSG FROM HR_GEN_AI_TOOLS_B B, HR_GEN_AI_TOOLS_TL T WHERE B.TOOL_ID=T.TOOL_ID AND T.LANGUAGE=USERENV('LANG')
